code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD ox_body_technique[Ox-Body Technique] click ox_body_technique callback " Ox-Body Technique

Cost: None
Duration: Permanent
Type: Special
Minimum Endurance: Varies
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None
The bodies of the Exalted are more durable than those of mere mortals. To help simulate this, an Exalt may buy extra health levels as if they were a Charm. A player may purchase this Charm up to once per dot of the Endurance Ability her character possesses. Each provides one -0 health level. " unswerving_juggernaut_principle[Unswerving Juggernaut Principle] click unswerving_juggernaut_principle callback " Unswerving Juggernaut Principle

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: Indefinite
Type: Simple
Minimum Endurance: 2
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

The stars bathe the character in yellow stardust. It suffuses her, glittering beneath her skin, hair, clothing and eyes. She begins to run. She must keep her eyes focused straight forward, keep her course within 10 degrees of its original heading and can take no other actions save walk, sprint, run, jump, ride, use a mobility-enhancing Charm or invoke the Lesser Sign of Mercury. Violating these strictures ends the Charm's effects. In exchange, for the duration of the Charm, the character receives an additional 5L/5B soak, needs no sleep, suffers no fatigue and adds her Essence to all Endurance rolls. Fatigue rolls do not need to be made for her wearing armor, regardless of environmental conditions. These benefits also apply to any horse she rides.
The character's journey is a thing of fate and not chance, interwoven with her reasons for traveling. If something renders her journey irrelevant or alters its appropriate destination, her player automatically makes a reflexive Perception + Awareness check for the Sidereal. Even on failure, she senses a change in the situation. Success gives her a hint of what it might be. Exalted who invoke this Charm while fleeing pursuit often know when it is safe to stop their flight. " forward_thinking_technique[Forward-Thinking Technique] unswerving_juggernaut_principle --> forward_thinking_technique click forward_thinking_technique callback " Forward-Thinking Technique

Cost: 10 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Indefinite
Type: Simple
Minimum Endurance: 3
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Unswerving Juggernaut Principle

The character's world narrows to his journey. The strands of fate that bind him to things behind him loosen. This Charm includes all of the benefits of the Unswerving Juggernaut Principle. In addition, it grants an increased (10L/10B) soak bonus against attacks the character cannot see coming. He can dodge any attack reflexively with a dice pool of 0 and his permanent Essence in automatic successes. He can evade pursuit and cover his tracks without slowing down, deviating from his course or ending the Charm. This requires the normal Wits + Survival roll. This Charm does not defeat supernatural tracking such as Inevitable Pursuit. It ex- plicitly prevents trackers from noticing the straight-line travel the Forward-Thinking Technique enforces unless they succeed at the tracking contest. " optimistic_security_practice[Optimistic Security Practice] click optimistic_security_practice callback " Optimistic Security Practice

Cost: 5 motes Duration: One scene Type: Simple Minimum Endurance: 2 Minimum Essence: 1 Prerequisite Charms: None Reflecting on the great sacrifices she might someday make for others, the character passes her hand over the weave of fate and imbues events with her own generosity of spirit. Weapons and other damage sources turn aside from her skin. She adds her permanent Essence to her lethal and bashing soak. This soak specifically applies even to aggravated damage sources. Creatures with Essence lower than her Compassion must spend one Willpower point each time they attempt to damage or disable her, or the attack automatically fails. This Charm is incompatible with the use of armor. " unwavering_well_being_meditation[Unwavering Well-Being Meditation] click unwavering_well_being_meditation callback " Unwavering Well-Being Meditation

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Endurance: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

The character's calm certainty in his own destiny turns aside a single event that might otherwise do him harm. Players of attackers with an Essence lower than the Sidereal's Temperance must succeed at a Willpower roll, or the attackers falter, and their attacks automatically fail. Even if they succeed, the character adds his permanent Essence to his lethal and bashing soak. This soak specifically applies even to aggravated damage sources. " heartless_maiden_trance[Heartless Maiden Trance] optimistic_security_practice --> heartless_maiden_trance unwavering_well_being_meditation --> heartless_maiden_trance click heartless_maiden_trance callback " Heartless Maiden Trance

Cost: 8 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Indefinite
Type: Simple
Minimum Endurance: 4
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Optimistic Security Practice, Unwavering Well-Being Meditation

The character's chest convulses as she swallows her heart. This suspends the normal functioning of her body. The Exalt no longer suffers nor accumulates penalties from disease, poison, degenerative effects, hunger, thirst, fatigue, exhaustion, cold, heat, wounds or blood loss. She does not need to breathe. She emerges from this Charm in the exact physical state she entered it, save for any new wounds taken and any poisons or diseases she contracted while under the effect - which, effectively, enter her system at that point. While this Charm lasts, the Exalt ignores all accrued penalties from debilitating conditions and wounds and is unaware of their existence. Sufficient injury yields a nagging tactical distress that encourages her to withdraw from combat, but she otherwise cannot accept the notion that she is sick, poisoned, hungry, cold, wounded or otherwise impaired. She does not regain Essence except through the use of Charms. She functions normally when Incapacitated and cannot be knocked unconscious, but she can be killed by doing more than her Stamina health levels beyond Incapacitated. " one_direction_invocation[One Direction Invocation] forward_thinking_technique --> one_direction_invocation heartless_maiden_trance --> one_direction_invocation click one_direction_invocation callback " One Direction Invocation

Cost: 16 motes, 1 Willpower, 1 health level
Duration: Indefinite
Type: Simple
Minimum Endurance: 5
Minimum Essence: 4
Prerequisite Charms: Forward-Thinking Technique, Heartless Maiden Trance

This Charm uses a prayer strip marked with the scripture of the Eternal Maiden. The character releases it into the air, where it darts and dances randomly about, staying within 100 yards of him, trailing vivid afterimages of yellow light. The character names a goal, which can be as grandiose or minor as he chooses, and geases himself to fulfill it.
A character under the influence of this Charm forsakes his name and his identity. Rolls to remember the character suffer a -3 die penalty (in addition to the normal penalty for remembering a Sidereal). The Exalt cannot focus on any goal save the one he named in the Charm. Irrelevant actions are forbidden. He suffers a three die penalty on all rolls that — while helping him toward his goal - have another primary purpose. How- ever, any non-aggravated injury or impairment the character receives while the Charm is active heals at the rate of one lethal health level or all bashing health levels per turn. Aggravated damage taken under the Charm's effects heals at one level per hour. The character heals preexisting conditions at the normal rate.
The character can end the Charm at any time but cannot reclaim his name and identity until he achieves his goal. If his goal becomes impossible to achieve, these things are forever lost. He cannot personally establish a new identity or name, and all attempts to do so fail, but high- ranking members of his division can issue replacements. "

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们要整理一下耐力（Endurance）系的Charm流程图，核心是从基础的Ox-Body Technique开始，然后分出两条主线：一条偏向移动和旅途，另一条偏向防御和生存。
明白了，Ox-Body作为根节点，没有前置条件。那移动线我先把Unswerving Juggernaut Principle放上去？这个Charm让角色被星尘覆盖，直线奔跑，获得5L/5B护甲和疲劳免疫。
对，而且它有 fate interwoven 的机制，旅程相关的事件改变时会有感知。这个节点下面要接Forward-Thinking Technique，是它的进阶。
好的，Unswerving Juggernaut Principle指向Forward-Thinking Technique的连线已加上。Forward-Thinking需要10motes和1点意志力， soak提升到10L/10B，还能盲闪。
防御线这边，Optimistic Security Practice和Unwavering Well-Being Meditation是两个独立的前置，都没有前置Charm要求，但后面会汇合。
Optimistic Security是场景级别的soak加成，对恶性伤害也有效；Unwavering Well-Being是即时反应，用Temperance对抗低Essence攻击者。这两个都指向同一个后续节点吗？
没错，它们共同解锁Heartless Maiden Trance。这个Charm很特别——角色吞下自己的心脏，进入无感状态，忽略所有伤口和状态惩罚。
两条线都连到Heartless Maiden Trance了。我注意到这个Charm有副作用：不能自然恢复Essence，Incapacitated状态下仍能行动，但超过Stamina的额外伤害会致死。
现在两条主线要在顶端汇合。Forward-Thinking Technique和Heartless Maiden Trance共同解锁One Direction Invocation，这是耐力系的终极Charm之一。
One Direction Invocation需要16 motes、1意志力和1健康等级，代价很高。它用祈祷纸条标记目标，角色放弃名字和身份，专注于单一目标，但获得极强的自愈能力——非恶性伤害每回合恢复，恶性伤害每小时恢复。
是的，而且如果目标变得不可能完成，名字和身份就永远丢失了。这个风险机制很重要。另外提醒一下，Unswerving Juggernaut Principle的描述里有个小错误——"10l/10b"应该是大写的"10L/10B"，代表致命和冲击伤害。
收到，我在Forward-Thinking Technique的描述里修正了大小写，应该是10L/10B。另外检查到Unswerving Juggernaut Principle的原文确实是5L/5B，没有写错。
还有One Direction Invocation的描述里，"grandiose"和"he chooses"的措辞要保留，这是原文的修辞。另外"in addition to the normal penalty for remembering a sidereal"这句关于记忆惩罚的机制要准确呈现。
已核对，记忆惩罚是-3骰，叠加在Sidereal固有的记忆难度上。还有"inevitable pursuit"——One Direction Invocation不能对抗Inevitable Pursuit这类超自然追踪，这个限制我也标注清楚了。
Heartless Maiden Trance的描述里，"she swallows her"后面应该是"heart"，确保完整。还有"aggravated"伤害的处理要强调——这个状态下新受的恶性伤害不会立即生效，退出时才结算。
修正了，"she swallows her heart"已补全。关于aggravated damage的机制：进入Heartless Maiden Trance前已存在的恶性伤害会被暂停，新受的恶性伤害在退出时一次性结算，对吗？
准确来说是新受的毒素和疾病在退出时进入系统，伤口则是实时累积的，只是角色无感知。最后检查一下所有节点的Minimum Endurance和Essence要求是否对应正确。
全部核对完毕：Ox-Body（Endurance可变/Essence 1）、Unswerving（2/2）、Forward-Thinking（3/3）、Optimistic Security（2/1）、Unwavering（3/2）、Heartless Maiden（4/2）、One Direction（5/4）。前置关系也都正确。
Forward-Thinking Technique里有个细节：它明确说不能击败Inevitable Pursuit，但能阻止追踪者注意到直线移动，除非追踪检定成功。这个"being" tracked的对抗机制要清晰。
明白，Inevitable Pursuit是特例，不受此Charm影响，但普通追踪需要对抗检定。另外Unswerving Juggernaut Principle的"invocation"限制——只能配合Lesser Sign of Mercury使用，这个我也保留了。
整体结构确认了。最后确认一下主题设置，这个流程图用dark主题，因为涉及Sidereal的星尘、命运这些比较神秘的元素。
主题已设为dark。整个流程图现在呈现为：Ox-Body Technique作为独立基础，向下分出Unswerving Juggernaut Principle和两条防御支线，最终在One Direction Invocation汇合，形成完整的耐力系Charm进阶路径。
